home.title: Welcome to ExpertGPTs
home.subtitle: Your Multi-Expert AI Assistant Platform
home.no_experts: No expert agents found. Create your first expert from Settings!

getting_started_steps.step1_desc: Enter your DeepSeek API key in Settings (it will be saved securely)
getting_started_steps.step2_desc: Select an expert agent from the navigation menu
getting_started_steps.step3_desc: Ask questions and get expert-level responses

home.create_experts_desc: Click the **"➕ Add Chat"** button in the sidebar to create your own domain-specific experts:

expert_features.feature1: Define the expert's name and specialization
expert_features.feature2: Set the temperature for response creativity
expert_features.feature3: Optionally provide a custom system prompt

features.title: Features
features.multiple_experts_desc: Chat with domain-specific AI experts, each specialized in different areas
features.multi_provider_desc: Choose between DeepSeek, OpenAI, Z.AI, and KIMI per expert
features.ai_prompts_desc: Let the LLM craft expert prompts from your description—no prompt engineering required
features.internationalization_desc: 13 languages with automatic detection and AI language response
features.template_architecture_desc: Consistent UI/UX across all experts with easy customization
features.theme_customization_desc: Personalize colors and appearance with preset themes
features.temperature_desc: Control response creativity (0.0-2.0) for each expert
features.modern_navigation_desc: Material Design icons using Streamlit's st.navigation() API
features.file_config_desc: Each expert has its own YAML config for easy management

status.application_will_rerun: The application will now rerun to load the new key.

forms.expert_name_placeholder: e.g., Python Expert, Data Scientist, Legal Advisor
forms.agent_description_placeholder: Describe the expert's domain, expertise, and capabilities...
forms.custom_system_prompt_placeholder:
How should this expert respond? (Optional)

Leave empty to auto-generate from description.

Example: "Provide clear, step-by-step explanations with code examples..."
forms.allowed_characters_desc: Letters, numbers, spaces, underscores (_), hyphens (-), and dots (.)

errors.required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.expert_exists: An expert named '{name}' already exists. Please use a different name or delete the existing expert first.
errors.api_key_invalid: API key appears to be invalid (too short)
errors.api_key_invalid_format: API key format is invalid. Expected format: {example}
errors.network_error: Network error: Could not reach {provider_name} API. Please check your connection.

success.defaults_saved: Defaults saved! New experts will use {provider} - {model}

info.select_llm_tip: Select your LLM provider and model first, then fill in the expert details below.
info.set_api_key_to_create: Set API key above to create experts
info.create_first_expert: No expert agents found. Create your first expert from the Home page!
info.ai_powered_tip: AI-powered generation! Leave empty to auto-generate a customized system prompt based on the description above. Provide your own for complete control.
info.manual_mode_tip: Manual mode: API key not set, so AI generation is unavailable. Keep the existing behavior, or provide your own.
info.language_prefix_auto: The expert will automatically respond in the user's selected language.
info.language_behavior_explanation: The expert always responds in your selected language, even if the behavior is written in English.

theme.title: Theme Customization
theme.description: Customize the appearance of your ExpertGPTs application.
theme.buttons_elements_help: Color for buttons and interactive elements
theme.background_help: Main background color of the app
theme.secondary_background_help: Background color for sidebar and other secondary areas
theme.text_help: Main text color throughout the app

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.warning: Warning: Actions in this section are irreversible and will delete all your data!
danger_zone.backup_description:
Download All Configurations will:
- Download all expert configuration files as a ZIP archive
- Preserve your custom experts and their settings
- Allow you to restore configurations later (manual import required)
danger_zone.reset_description:
Reset Application will:
- Delete all expert configurations
- Delete all expert pages
- Reset to the default example experts
danger_zone.final_warning: FINAL WARNING: This will delete all experts and reset the application!

about.title: About
about.description: A multi-expert AI chat application built with Streamlit, powered by the DeepSeek API.
about.developed_with: This entire application was developed with [Z.ai](https://z.ai/subscribe?ic=JGTYCX7ZO7)

add_chat.title: Add Chat
add_chat.api_key_required_desc:
New chats can only be created when an API key is defined.

Please set at least one provider's API key in **Settings → API Key** tab first.
add_chat.help_expert_name: A descriptive name for the domain expert
add_chat.help_expert_description: Detailed description of what this expert specializes in
add_chat.help_custom_behavior: This defines everything about your expert - tone, expertise, style, and constraints
add_chat.expert_behavior_docs:
### 🎯 Why This Field Matters Most

The behavior instructions define your expert's entire approach:
- **Tone**: Friendly, professional, casual, formal?
- **Expertise**: General overview or deep technical details?
- **Format**: Code examples, step-by-step, conversational?
- **Constraints**: What should the expert NOT do?
- **Guidelines**: Specific requirements for responses

### 📝 Example: Python Expert

```
You are a Python expert with 15 years of experience.
- Provide clean, PEP 8-compliant code with type hints and docstrings
- Explain concepts clearly with practical examples
- Warn about common pitfalls and best practices
- Suggest helpful libraries when appropriate
```

### 📝 Example: Legal Advisor

```
You are a legal assistant providing general legal information.
- Always include a disclaimer: "I am not a lawyer, this is not legal advice"
- Be thorough but cautious in recommendations
- Suggest consulting a qualified attorney for specific legal matters
- Provide general legal concepts and frameworks
```

### 📝 Example: Writing Coach

```
You are an encouraging writing coach.
- Ask questions to understand the writer's goals
- Provide specific, actionable feedback
- Balance praise with constructive criticism
- Suggest resources for improvement
- Be patient and supportive
```

edit_expert.title: Edit Expert: {name}
edit_expert.ai_powered_regeneration: AI-powered generation! Leave empty to regenerate a customized system prompt using AI. Provide your own for complete control.
edit_expert.manual_mode_regeneration: Manual mode: API key not set, so AI generation is unavailable. Keep the existing behavior, or provide your own.
edit_expert.help_expert_name: A descriptive name for the domain expert
edit_expert.help_expert_description: Detailed description of what this expert specializes in
edit_expert.help_custom_behavior: This defines everything about your expert - tone, expertise, style, and constraints
edit_expert.expert_behavior_docs_edit:
### 🎯 Why This Field Matters Most

The behavior instructions define your expert's entire approach:
- **Tone**: Friendly, professional, casual, formal?
- **Expertise**: General overview or deep technical details?
- **Format**: Code examples, step-by-step, conversational?
- **Constraints**: What should the expert NOT do?
- **Guidelines**: Specific requirements for responses

### 💡 Tip
Leaving this empty will keep the expert's current behavior. Only edit if you want to change how they respond!
